title: Vacancy for Teacher at Chandigarh University

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Chandigarh University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Chandigarh University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Chandigarh University:
Chandigarh University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
